flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at San Diego Christian College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 (47.3% → 19.7%).

flags.summary: 100%-time completion at San Diego Christian College fell 50% between 2021 and 2024 (36.1% → 18.0%).

flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 23 pp at San Diego Christian College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (23.5% vs 47.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at San Diego Christian College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).
